evidence_boundary: pilot_not_counted: P4c generated deterministic fake callback traces and metrics only. No real model, provider API, mobile device, network, tool action, screenshot, or verifier execution was performed. These artifacts are validator-compatible pilot scaffolds, not benchmark results.
